summary: Made a surgical exit-seam adjustment so chapter 16 now establishes Gavin moving deeper into the sub-collection, aligning the blocked-corridor situation and stone-table working position with chapter 17's opening. The chapter opening was already distinct from the visible adjacent opening, so no entry rewrite was needed.
edits: Added a brief relocation beat moving Gavin, the manuscript, and his notes into the innermost room.
Adjusted the closing image so Gavin is working at the stone table while the blocked corridor and battle noise remain active in the background.
